LanguageData.NCL_Battery.label: Advanced Battery
LanguageData.NCL_Battery.description: Medium-capacity power storage unit developed by NCL engineers. Utilizes quantum capacitance technology to reliably store 2000Wd electricity while maintaining efficient charge/discharge performance in harsh environments.
LanguageData.NCL_Large_Battery.label: Heavy Battery Array
LanguageData.NCL_Large_Battery.description: High-capacity military-grade energy storage designed by NCL. Features reinforced quantum capacitance arrays capable of storing up to 12,000Wd, meeting power demands of forward bases and heavy equipment.
LanguageData.NCL_LightWaterReactor.label: Light Water Reactor
LanguageData.NCL_LightWaterReactor.description: Modular nuclear power unit utilizing uranium fuel with flexible output up to 280,000Wd. Requires external cooling to maintain core temperature below 120°C. Coolant failure triggers void coefficient-induced power surges leading to meltdown - explosive yield varies with remaining fuel. This dual-purpose design enables both efficient power generation and weaponization potential.
